title: Old Tjikko Pest Trap Board, 12 Pack Multi-Insect Sticky Pads, Super Glue Sticky Catch Mats for Indoor, Outdoor, Home, Kitchen, Garden (12pc)
bullet_points: Effective Pest Control: These sticky pads are designed to trap a variety of insects, including flies, moths, and beetles, making them an ideal solution for indoor and outdoor pest control.
Versatile Application: Suitable for use in homes, kitchens, gardens, and other areas where insect infestations may occur, these traps offer a convenient and discreet solution.
Easy to Use: Simply peel off the protective film and place the sticky pads in desired locations to catch unwanted pests.
Bulk Pack: This pack contains 12 sticky pads, providing ample supply for widespread or long-term use.
Dimensions: Each sticky pad measures approximately 17 cm x 24 cm, offering a generous trapping surface area.
